aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Doctor Heat Pump due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in structured data and conversational content can significantly boost their visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Expand FAQ content to address common HVAC queries in a conversational tone.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite having FAQ content.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions and geo-coordinates.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation guides.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Las Vegas' where AI assistants prioritize highly structured and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding FAQ content to include local service nuances.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to HVAC expert by publishing detailed how-to guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your online presence for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them due to insufficient structured data and conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates advanced schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to make Doctor Heat Pump the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position as the leading HVAC provider in Las Vegas.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Optimize Your HVAC Business for AI Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI-driven visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI search users.
